name: failopen_empty_payload_ssr_flag_only
notes: synthetic — an all-empty/default payload triggers no meta/image/link/diff/h1/broken-link mutation and no manifest comment (manifest has no parts), so this is a "no-op" in the sense that none of the content transforms fire. addSsrFlag still unconditionally appends <script>window.seojuiceSSR = true;</script> before </body> regardless of payload content — that one addition is expected, not a bug.
